fixtureDescription: Forum post with embedded URLs and email addresses
passage: Hi everyone! I've been struggling with my English pronunciation lately. I found some helpful resources at https://www.englishpractice.com/pronunciation-guide and also this YouTube channel: https://youtube.com/@speakfluently. If you want to join our study group, send an email to studygroup2026@gmail.com or visit our Discord server at https://discord.gg/englishlearners. The weekly sessions have really helped me improve my confidence. Let me know if you have any recommendations!

items.levelRationale: Describes ongoing difficulty or effort with a task, requiring understanding of the continuous struggle concept.
items.importanceRationale: Helpful for understanding the speaker's main challenge and motivation.

items.levelRationale: Common collocation describing materials or tools that provide useful assistance.
items.importanceRationale: Useful for identifying what the speaker found valuable.

items.levelRationale: A common noun phrase for a group of people learning together.
items.importanceRationale: Essential for understanding the main topic and invitation.

items.levelRationale: Collocation describing regularly scheduled meetings, typically occurring once per week.
items.importanceRationale: Important for understanding the frequency and structure of the learning activity.

items.levelRationale: Collocation meaning to increase one's self-assurance or belief in one's abilities.
items.importanceRationale: Helpful for understanding the positive outcome of participation.

items.levelRationale: Phrasal verb meaning to inform or tell someone; request for information or feedback.
items.importanceRationale: Essential conversational phrase used to invite response.

items.levelRationale: Noun meaning suggestions or proposals for something that might be helpful or worthwhile.
items.importanceRationale: Important for understanding what the speaker is requesting from others.
